zh.Wilton Castle, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓
zh.Shirland, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby於大約1205年出生在英國德比夏爾時，他的父親Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor30歲，母親Isolda Bardolf24歲。他於大約1232年與Emma Cauz在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1252年被列為high sheriff of herefordshire。他去世於1266年3月18日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾藍德享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby于大约1205年出生在英国德比夏爾时，他的父亲Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor30岁，母亲Isolda Bardolf24岁。他于大约1232年与Emma Cauz在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1252年被列为high sheriff of herefordshire。他去世于1266年3月18日在英国英格兰德比夏爾藍德享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby was born about 1205, in Derbyshire, England, his father, Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor, was 30 and his mother, Isolda Bardolf, was 24. He married Emma Cauz about 1232, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1252, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of herefordshire. He died on 18 March 1266, in Shirland, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby est né environ 1205, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isolda Bardolf, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Emma Cauz environ 1232, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1252, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of herefordshire. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1266, à Shirland, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby um 1205 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor 30 und seine Mutter Isolda Bardolf 24. Er hat um 1232 in London, England Emma Cauz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1252 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff of herefordshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. März 1266 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Shirland, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby è nato il circa 1205 nel Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isolda Bardolf, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Emma Cauz circa 1232, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1252, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of herefordshire. Morì il 18 marzo 1266, nel Shirland, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derbyが約1205年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry de Grey Lord of Codnorは30歳，母Isolda Bardolfは24歳であった。約1232年にイギリスロンドンでEmma Cauzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1252年，職業はhigh sheriff of herefordshireと記録されている。彼は1266年3月18日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルランドで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby(이)가 대략 1205년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda Bardolf(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1232년 영국 런던에서 Emma Cauz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1252년, 그의 직업은 high sheriff of herefordshire이었다. 그는 1266년 3월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isolda Bardolf, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Cauz aproximadamente 1232, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1252, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of herefordshire. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1266, em Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham and Derby родился около 1205 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Grey Lord of Codnor было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda Bardolf, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Cauz около 1232 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1252 году он работал по профессии high sheriff of herefordshire. Он умер 18 марта 1266 г. в местности ширланд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
